        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_destroyer â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_sonar â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_light â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # improved_destroyer â€” 1940

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # modern_sonar â€” 1943

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_light }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # advanced_destroyer â€” 1944

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (4 techs) â”€â”€

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_endsieg = {
    # early_heavy_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (17 techs) â”€â”€

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# ww1_improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# ww1_advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_airplane_launcher
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_endsieg = {
    # ww1_early_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_basic_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): ww1_basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # ww1_improved_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): ww1_improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # ww1_advanced_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # early_light_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_airplane_launcher â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_airplane_launcher }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_airplane_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): ww1_advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_endsieg = {
    # ww1_basic_torpedo â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_basic_torpedo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = ww1_basic_torpedo
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_basic_battery â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_basic_battery }

        add_technology = modern_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / SUBMARINES (18 techs) â”€â”€

# ww1_early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1905 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines_endsieg = {
    # ww1_early_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_basic_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_basic_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_basic_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_improved_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_improved_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_improved_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_basic_submarine_snorkel â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_basic_submarine_snorkel }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_basic_submarine_snorkel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_advanced_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_advanced_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_advanced_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): ww1_improved_submarine_snorkel
    # early_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_submarine â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_submarine â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_aip_engine_improved_tech â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_submarine_snorkel â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine_snorkel }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_submarine â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = improved_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
    # advanced_submarine â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = advanced_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
